AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • WasmScopeAbiImports

    Interface WasmScopeAbiImports

    Imports exposed to a language-neutral Wasm client.

    interface WasmScopeAbiImports {
        buffer_free(bufferHandle: number): void;
        buffer_len(bufferHandle: number): number;
        buffer_ptr(bufferHandle: number): number;
        scope_delete(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
        scope_delete_named(
            namePtr: number,
            nameLen: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_flush(scopeHandle: number): number;
        scope_flush_named(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number;
        scope_get(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
        scope_get_named(
            namePtr: number,
            nameLen: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_resolve(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number;
        scope_set(
            scopeHandle: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
            valuePtr: number,
            valueLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_set_named(
            namePtr: number,
            nameLen: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
            valuePtr: number,
            valueLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_unbind(scopeHandle: number): number;
        scope_unbind_named(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number;
        scope_unwatch(watchHandle: number): number;
        scope_watch(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
        scope_watch_named(
            namePtr: number,
            nameLen: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
        ): number;
    }
    Index

    Methods

    buffer_free buffer_len buffer_ptr scope_delete scope_delete_named scope_flush scope_flush_named scope_get scope_get_named scope_resolve scope_set scope_set_named scope_unbind scope_unbind_named scope_unwatch scope_watch scope_watch_named

    Methods

    buffer_free

    • buffer_free(bufferHandle: number): void

      Releases a host-owned result buffer and its guest-memory allocation.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns void

    buffer_len

    • buffer_len(bufferHandle: number): number

      Returns the byte length for a host-owned result buffer.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns number

    buffer_ptr

    • buffer_ptr(bufferHandle: number): number

      Returns the guest pointer for a host-owned result buffer.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_delete

    • scope_delete(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Deletes a scope path. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_delete_named

    • scope_delete_named(
          namePtr: number,
          nameLen: number,
          pathPtr: number,
          pathLen: number,
      ): number

      Name-based variant of scope_delete.

      Parameters

      • namePtr: number
      • nameLen: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_flush

    • scope_flush(scopeHandle: number): number

      Runs queued Wasm scope bridge callbacks. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_flush_named

    • scope_flush_named(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number

      Name-based variant of scope_flush.

      Parameters

      • namePtr: number
      • nameLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_get

    • scope_get(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Returns a host-owned result buffer handle containing JSON for a scope path.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    • scope_get_named(
          namePtr: number,

      • nameLen: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_resolve

    • scope_resolve(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number

      Resolves a scope name to a numeric scope handle.

      Parameters

      • namePtr: number
      • nameLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_set

    • scope_set(
          scopeHandle: number,
          pathPtr: number,
          pathLen: number,
          valuePtr: number,
          valueLen: number,
      ): number

      Writes a JSON payload into a scope path. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number
      • valuePtr: number
      • valueLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_unbind

    • scope_unbind(scopeHandle: number): number

      Unbinds a scope handle without destroying the AngularTS scope.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number

      Returns number

    • scope_unbind_named(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number

      Name-based variant of scope_unbind.

      Parameters

      • namePtr: number
      • nameLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_unwatch

    • scope_unwatch(watchHandle: number): number

      Removes a watch handle. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • watchHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_watch

    • scope_watch(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Watches a scope path and returns a watch handle.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number
